steps.t: Múta can be found outside Gazat-fark, located on the lowest level of Deepscrave and to the south-east of Aslíf.
Four dwarf smiths are being held at Gazat-fark. One has been spotted on the ground level, and the other on the second floor. The others may be trapped…
You have rescued the dwarf smiths. You should return to Náin in Aslíf on the upper tier.
You have returned to Aslíf and should talk to Féli.
You should talk to Shúkurz and see what he has to say.
